code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut sorted = true
mut have_prev = false
mut prev = 0
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut val = 0

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
  if is_space
    if in_num
      let num = sign * val
      if have_prev and num < prev
        sorted = false
      end
      prev = num
      have_prev = true
      in_num = false
      sign = 1
      val = 0
    end
  else if b == 45 and not in_num
    sign = -1
    in_num = true
  else if b == 43 and not in_num
    sign = 1
    in_num = true
  else
    in_num = true
    val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  let num = sign * val
  if have_prev and num < prev
    sorted = false
  end
end

if sorted
  println("YES")
else
  println("NO")
end
